summary: Critical issues prevent execution: (1) actions/checkout@v4 violates SHA-pinning requirement (must use full 40-char commit SHA per stated security practice); (2) workflow references missing fixtures/secrets_mixed.json and tests/ directory—workflow will fail immediately; (3) curl download of actionlint lacks error handling. Python code is well-structured with good type hints and error messages, but deliverable is incomplete. Lines 42 (actionlint curl) and 55-60 (pytest references) depend on non-existent files.
